Game: Harukanaru Augusta 2- Masters 1993-09-22T00:00:00-07:00 A golf game and the sequel to their 1991 game Harukanaru Augusta. The Augusta of the title refers to the famous Augusta National Golf Club in Augusta, Georgia, which is the setting for The Masters tournament each year. For this game, the player is a participant in the 1993 Masters competition. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/be7f6fc8-a490-4d70-a1fe-e4ffd8cbfdc4.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/76ef09e0-7406-405d-ac15-118647e39788.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/8673bc1f-2cb6-4c53-9508-b96d82b7b4b6.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/771cf3a9-3103-4c6b-93b9-1f6750cc4d8e.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/39d08978-bb1c-4487-8253-43e09cb446ba.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/7bbdee3a-74b4-4fee-9897-8fadde820283.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/ed4bde2d-f0f1-49e2-aa81-2d4e76f9c210.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/9df594d9-935c-4e86-a5f8-0fe566a82010.png Sports T&E Soft T&E Soft
